subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-22 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: They [the American Baha'is] are people of every stripe. There are those pure Baha'is who believe in all the divine religions and subscribe to the truth of Islam
subcodes.first_line_orig: از هر قبیل هستند نفوسی بهآئی خالصند که مؤمن  بجمیع ادیان و موقن بحقیقت اسلامند کسانی هستند
